mechanism_narrative: Sustained declines in the federal funds rate reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 8.0%, it signals a tightening labor market that historically precedes wage-driven consumption growth, lifting equity returns over a one-month horizon.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in more than 50% of instances where UNRATE crosses below 8.0% within a 3-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in industrial production and housing starts indicates broad-based economic expansion, which historically amplifies corporate profit growth and drives positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive 60-day returns in more than 60% of out-of-sample windows, or partial correlation with INDPRO alone exceeds the interaction term.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-inflation environment, rising real rates compress equity multiples; however, when CPIAUCSL stabilizes while FEDFUNDS remains near zero, risk premia contract and drive short-term equity gains.
failure_condition: Forward returns turn negative when CPIAUCSL stabilizes and FEDFUNDS stays below 0.25%, or the interaction term shows no statistical significance in a rolling regression.

mechanism_narrative: Sequential quarterly growth in real GDP reduces recession probabilities and improves earnings expectations, producing a persistent positive drift in S&P 500 returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are statistically indistinguishable from zero when GDPC1 shows positive quarter-over-quarter growth over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment gains exceeding 150,000 per month signal robust labor demand that historically translates into stronger consumer spending and positive equity momentum over a weekly horizon.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns are negative in more than 55% of months where PAYEMS exceeds the 150k threshold, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for UNRATE.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial output coupled with declining unemployment indicates supply-side capacity utilization meeting strong demand, which historically compresses margins less and supports equity valuations over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint indicator fails to outperform a baseline buy-and-hold strategy over any 3-year rolling window, or the interaction coefficient becomes insignificant when GDP growth is included.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of elevated inflation, a sustained drop in the federal funds rate acts as a liquidity injection that overrides inflation fears, driving short-term equity rallies when real rates turn negative.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain negative when FEDFUNDS declines rapidly during high CPIAUCSL readings, or the signal's directional accuracy drops below 50% in a 10-year backtest.
